title: The Naga Hills-Tuensang Area Act, 1957
full_text: The Naga Hills-Tuensang Area Act, 1957 null Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195742 Act Number: 42 Enactment Date: 1957-11-29 Act Year: 1957 Short Title: The Naga Hills-Tuensang Area Act, 1957 Long Title: An Act to provide for the formation of the Naga Hills-Tuensang Area of Assam as an administrative unit. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-12-1957 Notification: 1st December, 1957, vide notification No. S.R.O. 3843, dated 30th November, 1957, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3. Formation of Naga Hills-Tuensang Area. Section 3. Amendment of the Sixth Schedule to the Constitution. Section 4. Amendment of the Delimitation Order. Section 5. [Repealed.]. Section 6. Provision as to the sitting member of Parliament. Section 7. Territorial extent of laws not to be affected.
